description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal attire, featuring a long overcoat layered over a suit jacket and vest, with a collared shirt and tie visible at the neckline. The figure stands upright with both hands clasped behind the back, giving an impression of composure and attentiveness. The facial features are well-defined, with a clean-shaven face and neatly styled short hair. The trousers are tailored and paired with formal dress shoes, completing the business-like appearance. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a professional or urban context. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the posture is relaxed yet formal.
description: A formally dressed adult male standing upright with hands clasped behind his back, wearing a long overcoat, suit, and dress shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, shirt and tie, overcoat, and both arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the overcoat, and the arm position behind the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, overcoat, and both hands clasped behind the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, overcoat, and the arm position behind the back.
attribute_clothing_type: formal long overcoat, suit jacket, vest, collared shirt, necktie, tailored trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands clasped behind back
